preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.interface_lang_desc: Language for UI text and default narrative.
preferences.serif_font_desc: Serif font for GM narrative text; UI uses sans-serif.
preferences.autosave_desc: Write a save and backup after each turn.

black_swan.title: Black Swan Events
black_swan.enable_desc: GM may inject unexpected world events to break narrative predictability (sprint 5 Black Swan agent). Disable for a calm, predictable narrative.

extractor.title: Narrative Extractor (GM Step 2)
extractor.enable_desc: Split GM into two steps: main model for narrative, cheaper model for structured ops. ~5x lower error rate, ~20% higher cost.
extractor.api_desc: Anthropic uses native tool_use (most stable); Vertex uses response_mime_type=application/json; others use OpenAI-compatible response_format.
extractor.model_desc: Recommended: budget tiers of current flagship models — gemini-3.5-flash / claude-haiku-4 / gpt-5.5-nano / qwen-3.7-flash etc.

clarify.title: Curator Clarify Threshold
clarify.threshold_desc: When confidence is below this value, curator skips GM and asks the player directly. 0 = never ask, 1 = always ask first.

models.title: API Keys
models.description: Only shows providers with a configured API Key. Keys are encrypted in the user credentials table and never stored in plaintext.
models.empty_desc: Add an API Key for a provider to see its models here.
models.connectivity_refresh_tip: Click to retest this API Key and sync remote models
models.delete_key_confirm: Delete the API Key for "{{name}}"? Its models will no longer be available.

add_model.title: Configure a new model
add_model.real_name_hint: Sent to {{api}} as the model name
add_model.caps_hint: Affects where this model can be used

edit_api.provider_desc: Select a supported provider to auto-fill the Base URL; choose Custom to enter manually.
edit_api.provider_desc_user: Select a supported provider; the admin-configured Base URL will be used. Custom providers must be added by an admin.
edit_api.custom_provider_desc: Enter ID and Base URL manually
edit_api.custom_admin_only: Custom providers must be configured by an admin first. Choose a supported provider for now.
edit_api.api_key_desc_new: Encrypted at rest; never shown again after saving
edit_api.api_key_placeholder_keep: Leave blank to keep current key
edit_api.key_save_fail: Metadata saved but API key write failed

visibility.title: {{selected}} / {{total}} models shown in list
visibility.no_match: No match · Try a different search
visibility.info: Hiding does not delete models — they just won't appear in the main list. POST /api/v1/models/visibility

validate.fail_hint: Check API key configuration or Base URL reachability.
validate.local_extra: {{count}} local model(s) missing from remote probe or unreachable
validate.in_sync: Local list matches remote — no changes needed.

model_list.no_match: No match · None of {{count}} models meet the criteria
model_list.hidden_note: {{count}} models hidden · Click Edit Visibility to manage
model_list.key_expired_detail: Please update this provider's API key
model_list.health_degraded: Degraded · High latency or rate limited
model_list.health_untested: Untested · Click API Test to check

modelparams.title: Model Settings
modelparams.description: Sampling parameters · Applies to all API calls
modelparams.preset_desc: Quick-switch a set of common parameters; selecting Custom prevents overwrite.
modelparams.reasoning_desc: Thinking depth for reasoning models (o3 / R1 etc.); low = fast & token-efficient, high = deepest.
modelparams.max_tokens_desc: Maximum response length per turn; too short will cause truncation.
modelparams.context_size_desc: Upper limit of tokens per request; older history is truncated when exceeded.
modelparams.seed_desc: Same seed + same input = reproducible output; -1 = random each time.
modelparams.stop_desc: Stop generating when these strings appear; separate multiple with |.
modelparams.nsfw_desc: Controls whether GM generates sensitive content involving sex / violence. Sexualization of minors is always blocked regardless of mode.
modelparams.nsfw_intensity_desc: 0 = only on explicit player request; 1 = GM may actively escalate. Effective only in Open / Explicit mode.
modelparams.nsfw_extra_desc: Appended to system prompt; use for additional prohibitions, age verification, story prerequisites.
modelparams.mirostat_desc: Dynamic temperature adjustment; effective on some local models.
modelparams.preview_json_desc: Actual sampling parameters sent to the API.

modules.title: Per-Module Model Assignment
modules.description: Set your personal default main GM model, and optionally assign independent models per LLM submodule.
modules.hint: The main GM default is saved to your personal preferences. Other modules reuse it unless overridden. The list only shows provider models you have configured and synced.
modules.inherit_tip: Not overridden — using main GM's current model
modules.footer: Changes are saved immediately via POST /api/me/preference. Each module picks up the new setting on next invocation.

memory.recall_depth_desc: Max passages retrieved from source per turn (2–20).
memory.summary_window_desc: Compress the last N turns into a summary for injection (3–20).
memory.token_budget_desc: Max tokens of memory content injected into context per request (200–2000).
memory.auto_archive: Auto-archive Old Memories After N Turns
memory.auto_archive_desc: Memory entries older than this many turns are auto-archived to the fact store (10–200).
memory.pinned_max_desc: Max entries in the pinned bucket (5–100). Older entries are moved to fact store when exceeded.
memory.bucket_pinned_desc: When disabled, pinned bucket is not maintained; recall only uses time-based and character buckets.
memory.bucket_world_desc: When disabled, world-lore memory retrieval injection is skipped.
memory.bucket_character_desc: When disabled, character-relationship memory retrieval injection is skipped.

permissions.title: Write Permissions
permissions.default_mode_desc: Default permissions used when creating a new save. Can be changed in-game at any time.
permissions.mode_review: Auto Review — low-risk pass, high-risk prompt
permissions.mode_full: Full Access — prompt only for major world-line changes
permissions.high_risk_desc: Even in Full Access mode, these fields trigger a non-blocking confirmation. Click to toggle.
permissions.custom_whitelist_desc: Add custom paths (e.g. world.weather.severity); these always prompt even in Full Access mode.
permissions.err_invalid: Only letters, digits, underscores, dots, and asterisks are allowed; must start with a letter or underscore
permissions.err_in_builtin: This path is already in the built-in whitelist
permissions.audit_log_desc: Last 200 state write / rejection / parse-failure records (per save). Empty when no active save.
permissions.audit_no_state: No active save. Audit entries generated during gameplay will appear here.

deploy.title: Deployment
deploy.warning: Note: Network-level settings such as listen address and CORS origins require a service restart to take effect. SMTP and CAPTCHA credentials take effect immediately.
deploy.listen_addr_desc: Use 127.0.0.1 for local-only access. Requires restart.
deploy.cors_desc: Comma-separated; use * to allow all. Requires restart.
deploy.upload_limit_desc: Maximum single file size, e.g. 12MB or 1GB. Requires restart.
deploy.upload_limit_error: Invalid format. Enter something like 12MB, 512KB, or 1GB
deploy.smtp_desc: Used for registration verification, password reset, and subscription notifications. Disabled means local placeholder mail.
deploy.smtp_preset_desc: Quick-fill common provider settings; you can fine-tune after selecting.
deploy.smtp_from_desc: Sender shown to recipients; recommended to use a domain email.
deploy.smtp_test_desc: Send a test email to the current account's email address immediately.
deploy.captcha_desc: Used for registration / password reset / login retry. Recommended in production.
deploy.captcha_recaptcha_ver_desc: v2 = popup challenge · v3 = invisible scoring; v3 recommended.
deploy.captcha_score_desc: Scores below this are treated as bots; 0.5 is a good starting point.
deploy.captcha_widget_desc: Non-interactive suits most cases; interactive adds a challenge for suspicious users.
deploy.captcha_triggers_desc: Check the features that require verification; forced after 3 failed logins by default.

danger.title: Danger Zone
danger.clear_saves_desc: Keeps scripts and library, but deletes all progress and branches.
danger.reset_platform_desc: Full reset is not supported from the UI; run it via server CLI.
danger.clear_modal_desc: This will delete all {{count}} save(s) and their branch trees. Scripts and library are preserved. This cannot be undone.

providers.title: Provider Credentials (BYOK)
providers.description: API keys are encrypted in the user credentials table; not stored in plaintext in the catalog. base_url supports relay/proxy override.
providers.keep_key: Leave blank to keep current key

sa.unavailable_desc: Platform-hosted agent / embedding models are only available to select accounts. Please use your own API key.

account.title: Account
account.co_builder_desc: Control whether your username appears in the public acknowledgements when the project is open-sourced. Username only — no email.
account.co_builder_na: Only applicable to users registered via magic link invitation

nav.profile_sub: Account status, platform overview, and recent resources
nav.saves_branches_sub: Draggable mind map — view branches and continue
nav.cards_npc_sub: In-save NPC cards, shared across saves
nav.cards_online_sub: Browse and import character cards others have shared publicly
nav.library_sub: Upload, organize, and download media and document assets
nav.settings_sub: User preferences, API & models, memory & permissions
nav.usage_sub: Requests, token consumption, cost, latency, error rate
nav.skills_sub: Importable Skill packages for self-hosted deployments
nav.apis_sub: Stable feature commands and versioned API endpoints
nav.admin_deploy_sub: Listen address, CORS, SMTP, CAPTCHA (site-level, admin only)
nav.admin_users_sub: User list, role assignment, banning, session management
nav.admin_usage_sub: Platform-wide token consumption and cost overview
nav.admin_audit_sub: Admin action records and security events
nav.admin_health_sub: Database, memory, disk, and process status
nav.admin_security_sub: IP blocklist, rate limiting, password policy
nav.admin_maintenance_sub: Maintenance mode toggle and global announcements
nav.admin_dmca_takedowns_sub: DMCA takedown request intake and disposition records
nav.admin_dmca_strikes_sub: Strike accumulation and account restriction management
nav.admin_aup_actions_sub: Policy violation — suspend / reinstate / terminate account
nav.admin_feedback_sub: Review user-submitted feedback and make decisions
nav.admin_achievements_sub: Manage achievement definitions, rules and tiers

search.placeholder: Search pages, scripts, saves, cards, world book, memories, models, library, settings…

welcome.title: Welcome to Beta Platform
welcome.beta_warning_body: This platform is in **closed beta** and may have critical bugs. Data loss is possible — do not rely solely on this platform for important content.
welcome.feedback_section_body: Click the "Feedback" button in the top bar → describe the issue → submit. The developer will handle your report.
welcome.api_section_title: Bring Your Own Key (BYOK) · No API Service Provided
welcome.api_section_body: Both the GM chat and the RAG embedder are bring-your-own-key (BYOK): you provide and configure your own AI API Key (Anthropic / OpenAI / Vertex / DeepSeek, etc.). The platform does not provide AI API calls on your behalf.
welcome.co_builder_label: Include me in the Beta Co-builders list (acknowledged at open-source release)
welcome.co_builder_hint: We will publicly list the usernames of testers who consent to being credited at open-source release

users.title: User Management
users.description: User list, role assignment, banning, and session management
users.confirm_deactivate_body: This user will not be able to log in, but their data is preserved. You can restore anytime.
users.confirm_reactivate_body: This user will be able to log in again.
users.confirm_force_logout_body: All sessions will be invalidated immediately; the user must log in again.
users.confirm_set_admin_body: This user will gain system administration privileges.
users.confirm_set_user_body: This user will lose system administration privileges.

usage.title: Global Usage
usage.description: Platform-wide token consumption and cost overview

audit.title: Audit Log
audit.description: Admin action records and security events

health.title: System Health
health.description: Database, memory, disk, and process status (auto-refresh every 30s)

registration.invite_description: Manage invite codes for controlled registration
registration.delete_confirm_body: Delete invite code {{code}}? This cannot be undone.

security.rate_limit_notice: Rate limit changes require a service restart to take effect.
security.field_ip_blocklist: One IP or CIDR per line (e.g. 192.168.1.0/24)

maintenance.mode_description: All users will see a maintenance banner when enabled
maintenance.mode_warning: Maintenance mode is active. All users will see the maintenance banner. Disable as soon as maintenance is complete.
maintenance.message_placeholder: System upgrade in progress, expected to resume in XX minutes…
maintenance.restart_description: Send a graceful reload signal to the backend
maintenance.restart_warning: Restart causes a brief outage (typically 5–15 seconds). Recommended after enabling maintenance mode.
maintenance.restart_modal_body: A graceful reload (SIGTERM/graceful reload) signal will be sent. In-flight requests will be completed where possible. New requests may fail for ~5–15 seconds — ensure users are notified or maintenance mode is active.
maintenance.restart_ok: Restart signal sent — service will gracefully reload

dmca_takedowns.title: DMCA Takedown Queue
dmca_takedowns.restore_default_reason: Counter-notice period elapsed, no injunction — restoring content
dmca_takedowns.action_reason_placeholder: Enter reason; will be recorded in audit log…
dmca_takedowns.counter_info: A 10-day restoration timer will be set automatically. Ensure the counter-notice has been forwarded to the original complainant.

dmca_strikes.title: Strike Records
dmca_strikes.description: DMCA repeat offender tracking (3 strikes triggers termination)
dmca_strikes.strike_warning: At 3 strikes, the account termination process triggers automatically. Proceed carefully.
dmca_strikes.strike_reason_placeholder: e.g. DMCA takedown record #42, notice verified
dmca_strikes.strike_added_terminated: Strike added ({{count}} total) — account terminated automatically

csam.title: CSAM Reports
csam.description: CSAM content report records and decisions (CSAM-01..04)
csam.warning: CSAM reports involve extremely sensitive content. Strictly follow the docs/runbooks/csam.md procedure. Limit access to need-to-know personnel — do not view content directly.
csam.decision_warning: If Founded: immediately follow csam.md to report to NCMEC CyberTipline and suspend the reported account.
csam.notes_placeholder: Basis for decision, CyberTipline report ID, etc…

aup.title: AUP Account Actions
aup.info: Search for a user, then suspend (temporary), reinstate, or permanently terminate. Termination is irreversible.
aup.suspend_reason_placeholder: Describe the violation; will be emailed to user…
aup.unsuspend_confirm: Reinstate account {{name}}? The user will be able to log in again.
aup.terminate_warning: Permanent termination revokes all sessions and writes to the ban list. This cannot be undone. Confirm that the appeals process is complete.
aup.terminate_reason_placeholder: e.g. Repeat AUP violations, appeals completed (Ticket #XXXX)

feedback.title: Feedback Review
feedback.description: User-submitted feedback review queue — mark OK / NSFW Terminate / Spam
feedback.terminate_reason_desc: Written to account_delete_queue — briefly describe the violation
feedback.terminate_reason_placeholder: e.g. Submitted excerpt containing explicit NSFW content…

my.title: Scripts
my.description: Manage imported scripts: view chapters, override settings, build vector index, or export.
my.empty: No scripts yet. Click "Import Script" in the top right to get started.
my.play_block_importing: An import or rebuild job is still running in the background. Wait for it to finish before starting, so the setup flow does not stall on the starting point.
my.play_block_missing: This script is missing data required to start a game: {{items}}. Finish import/rebuild before starting.

public.title: Public Script Library
public.description: Browse scripts shared publicly by other users, and import them to your account (includes chapters, cards, and worldbook).
public.empty: No publicly shared scripts yet. Go to 'My Scripts' and make one public — it will appear here.

import.preview_step1: 1 / 3 · Reading file and normalizing line endings
import.preview_footer: Showing first {{count}} chapters · See full split in the script directory after import · POST /api/v1/scripts/import
import.basic_desc: Give the script a name and choose a chapter split rule.
import.field_title_desc: Leave blank to use the filename
import.field_custom_regex_desc: Only applies when 'Custom' rule is selected
import.pipeline_options_desc: Pipeline has 8 stages: ① chunks → ② chapter facts → ③ entity extract → ④ NPC cards (LLM) → ⑤ worldbook (LLM) → ⑥ canon extract (LLM) → ⑦ timeline anchors → ⑧ embeddings. Only stages ④/⑤ are toggleable — the others are core (chunks/facts/canon/index always run). Uncheck both to skip LLM entirely (chapter index + embeddings only).
import.enable_cards_desc: Scans first 30 chapters for frequent characters and writes editable cards (LLM call).
import.enable_worldbook_desc: Aggregates entities across all chapters into worldbook entries (LLM call).
import.partial_pipeline_warn: ⚠ Disabling either step means you get chapter index + vectors only; the GM will lack characters/world context at chat time. You can backfill later from the Knowledge Extract panel.
import.file_desc: Drop or select a TXT / MD file, max 50 MB.
import.warn_no_file: Please select a local script file before estimating.
import.preview_analyzing: Backend is splitting and counting chapters…
import.preview_invalidated_detail: Preview the chapter split again before importing so the budget and uploaded file state match the current rule.
import.import_busy: Import is already running. Please wait.
import.importing_bg: Import in progress — you can close the window and come back.
import.banner_desc: job {{id}} · elapsed {{elapsed}}s · page refresh won't interrupt, task runs in background
import.queued_desc: Queued: {{n}} import(s) ahead, estimated {{eta}} min wait
import.result_cancelled_detail: Import pipeline cancelled. Job {{id}} has stopped and will not keep spending model calls.
import.estimate_desc: 『{{file}}』 · {{rule}} · Model: {{model}} · Actual cost depends on chapter length
import.stage_save_hint: Write to script table + full-text index
import.stage_extract_hint: Scan chapters, discover character names + relationships
import.stage_card_hint: Generate character sheet for each identified character
import.api_key_required_preimport_body: '{{title}}' has not been added to your script library yet. Full import must use your own {{provider}} credential; the uploaded file and estimate are saved so you can continue after configuring it.
import.api_key_required_preimport_toast: No script was created. Configure an API key first; this import draft was saved.
import.api_key_required_body: Basic import for '{{title}}' is complete. Model steps such as character cards, worldbook, and timeline must use your own {{provider}} credential; configure it, then return here to continue the knowledge pipeline.
import.api_key_required_toast: Basic import was saved. Configure an API key to continue the model knowledge pipeline.
import.saved_upload_expired_detail: The saved upload chunks were already cleaned up. Please choose the file again, preview it, and then import.
import.import_ok_needs_api: Script #{{id}} · {{title}} created. Configure an API key to continue character cards/worldbook/timeline.
import.embedder_error_title: Embedding configuration may have an issue
import.embedder_not_configured_body:
After import, without a configured embedding (RAG) model the vector index cannot be built — RAG semantic recall degrades to keyword matching, hurting in-game character/worldbook accuracy.
We recommend configuring an API key that supports the /embeddings endpoint (e.g. OpenAI, Deepseek Embedding, Cohere) under Settings → RAG / Embedding model before importing.
import.embedder_not_configured_title: No RAG / embedding model configured (optional, but recommended)

editor.overrides_desc: Script overrides (script_overrides): override default settings, read by the GM.
editor.wb_empty: No worldbook entries yet. They will appear after extraction / indexing.
editor.npc_empty: No NPC cards for this script yet. They will be created after extraction / import, or you can add them manually.
editor.timeline_empty: No timeline anchors yet. Phases and story-time anchors will appear after extraction.
editor.overrides_hint: Edit the JSON object directly. Field meaning is determined by the backend; unknown keys are preserved.
editor.resplit_tip: Re-split the whole book (with new rule)
editor.chapters_empty: No chapters in this script. Try 'Re-split All' to change the split rule.
editor.embed_breakdown_desc: Vector index split by content type; can be selectively re-embedded.
editor.anchors_desc: script_timeline_anchors, built from chapter_facts story-time labels, zero LLM
editor.canon_desc: kb_canon_entities — normalized character/org/location entities extracted by the LLM; distinct from NPC cards.
editor.canon_editor_todo: kb_canon_entities table editor: see /api/scripts/{id}/canon — table view lands in a later phase. Currently usable
editor.cards_desc: Playable NPC cards, distinct from knowledge-base entities
editor.embed_warn_chunks_missing: Chapter embeddings not built; RAG falls back to keyword

review.extract_done_detail: Script has been reset to 'Pending Review'
review.cancel_requested: Cancel requested (takes effect at next checkpoint)
review.must_estimate_first: To prevent accidental token burn, you must click 'Estimate Cost' first. Changing any parameter requires a fresh estimate.
review.scope_desc: Default 'Full' re-imports the whole script. 'Embeddings only' just regenerates canon entity vectors — no LLM calls.
review.scope_embed_only_note: No LLM calls. Regenerates the vector index for existing knowledge base characters (use when changing the embedding model or backfilling missing vectors). Uses your own BYOK credentials (Vertex / other embedding provider) — not platform-paid.
review.scope_worldbook_only_note: No LLM calls. Rebuilds the worldbook from existing knowledge base characters (use after tweaking importance thresholds / subtype rendering). $0.
review.scope_anchors_only_note: No LLM calls. Rebuilds timeline anchors from chapter summary story-time labels (use after fixing aggregation logic or story_phase). $0.
review.chapter_range_desc: Re-extract only this chapter range (targeted redo). Empty = whole book.
review.desc: Re-run full-book LLM knowledge extraction (seed vocab → arc/per-chapter extraction → entity resolution → embedding). Runs in the background; you can close the window and check back later. The script will be marked as 'Pending Review' when done.
review.provider_empty: No APIs configured in Model Manager
review.model_empty: No models available for this provider
review.extract_complete: Extraction complete. Script settings updated; marked 'Pending Review' — check in Settings Review.

toast.import_ok_detail: Script #{{id}} · {{title}} — base knowledge index syncing in background
toast.embed_no_embedder_hint: Go to Settings → RAG / Embedding model to add an API Key
toast.embed_started_detail: Vertex text-embedding-004 running in background — progress shown on button
toast.mock_warn: Example budget only — no file uploaded
toast.mock_warn_detail: Please select a local file before confirming import
toast.select_file_first: Please select a local file first
toast.import_partial: Import partially completed; some modules failed
toast.sse_disconnected: Progress stream disconnected; switched to polling

confirm.delete_msg: Delete script '{{title}}'? Related saves and indexes will also be removed.
confirm.publish_msg: Share script '{{title}}' publicly? Other users will be able to browse and import its chapters, cards, and worldbook.

share.fork_alert_body: This script is shared by another user. Fork it to edit or save as a copy.
share.fork_confirm_body: A copy named "{{title}} (Copy)" will be created.

version.rollback_disabled_tip: Only the script owner can rollback
version.rollback_confirm: Rollback to commit {{id}}? The current head will be overwritten. This cannot be undone.

edit.readonly_body: You are not the owner of this script. Fork it to edit.

canon.title: Knowledge Base Characters
canon.description: Manage characters / factions / locations / items / concepts in the knowledge base.
canon.empty: No knowledge base entries yet. Click 'New KB entry' to get started.

anchors.title: Timeline Anchors
anchors.description: Manage story phases and time anchors for GM narrative pacing.
anchors.empty: No timeline anchors yet. They will be created after extraction, or add one manually.

worldbook.title: Worldbook
worldbook.header_desc: Manage worldbook entries: edit title, priority, and enabled state inline in the table, or click a row to open the detail panel.
worldbook.readonly_body: This script is shared by another user and cannot be edited directly. Fork it to create your own editable copy.

auth.subtitle: Novel splitting · RPG continuation · Multi-user creative platform
auth.forgot_notice: Please contact an admin to reset your password (self-service not yet available)
auth.invite_only_tip: This deployment is invite-only; registration is closed
auth.invite_only_note: This deployment is invite-only. Contact an admin to get an account.
auth.first_admin: The first registered user will become the admin.
auth.min_password: Password must be at least {{min}} characters.
auth.terms_not_accepted: Please read and accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
auth.age_not_confirmed: Please confirm you are 18 years of age or older
auth.terms_agree: I have read and agree to the

verify.resend_ok: Code resent, please check your email
verify.sent_notice: Verification code sent to {{mask}}. Please verify within 10 minutes.

login_code.desc: Enter your verified email and we will send a one-time sign-in code.
login_code.email_required: Please enter a valid email address
login_code.sent_notice: Code sent to {{mask}}. Sign-in starts automatically after 6 digits.

auth.forgot_email_required: Please enter a valid email address
auth.forgot_desc: Enter your registered email and we will send a password reset link (valid for 30 minutes).
auth.forgot_sent: If that email is registered and verified, a reset link has been sent. Please check your inbox.
auth.reset_desc: Enter a new password (at least 8 characters).
auth.reset_token_invalid_or_expired: Reset link is invalid or expired. Please request a new one.
auth.reset_token_used: This reset link has already been used. Please request a new one.

list.title: Saves
list.description: Select a save to view details, adjust settings, or continue playing.
list.empty_no_saves: No saves yet — click New Game to start

detail.export_modal_desc: Self-contained bundles can be imported to any instance (including open-source self-hosted). The Standard tier requires re-embedding on import — go to the Script page and click "Embed" to rebuild search.
detail.export_tier_full_desc: Includes vector index — ready for RAG search immediately after import
detail.export_tier_standard_desc: No vectors, smaller size — re-embed after import (recommended)
detail.snippet_empty: (No recent snippet — will sync automatically when you play.)

settings_form.title: Game Settings
settings_form.description: Meta-knowledge / guidance / spoiler prevention. Creation-locked fields (worldline / identity) are read-only in-game.
settings_form.save_locked_warn: Saved, but {{fields}} are creation-locked and were not changed

branches.title: Branch Nodes
branches.empty: No branch nodes yet — they are generated automatically when you play.
branches.page_subtitle: {{commits}} commits · {{refs}} refs · one git system per save
branches.no_saves_body: You don't have any saves yet
branches.no_saves_hint: Go to the Scripts page, pick a script, and start a new game — the branch graph will appear once a save exists.
branches.legend: Column (swimlane) = branch lane  ·  ○ = commit dot (ring = HEAD/active)  ·  dashed = deleted subtree
branches.delete_body_irrev: and all its downstream branches. This cannot be undone within this save.

confirm.delete_body: Delete save "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone (disk commit files can still be recovered).

toast.imported_bundle_warn: Import complete, but {{count}} item(s) were skipped. First: {{first}}

continue.no_saves:
No saves yet.
Click New Game below to create one from an imported script.
continue.new_game_desc: Create a new save from a script, starting from the opening
continue.hint_dblclick: Double-click a save to go straight to branch selection
continue.no_branch_nodes: This save has no branch nodes yet.
continue.no_branch_hint: Click Continue below to enter at root — nodes are created automatically as you play.
continue.more_nodes_hint: Continuing from a mid-tree node will create a new fork
continue.fork_tip: This node already has descendants — continuing here will create a new fork
continue.info_fork: Node #{{id}} is not the current branch tip — continuing will create a new fork; the original branch is preserved
continue.info_continue: Node #{{id}} is the current branch tip — will continue the same branch

new_game.no_scripts_suffix: to upload one, then come back to start a new game.
new_game.sec_basic_desc: Name the save and choose a script to play.
new_game.sec_role_desc: Choose an existing persona / character card, or create a new one.
new_game.sec_birthpoint_desc_ready: Choose a story anchor to start from.
new_game.sec_birthpoint_desc_wait: Select a script in Basic Info first.
new_game.sec_identity_desc: Optional positioning overlay based on starting point and character — or create a custom one.
new_game.sec_intent_desc: Tell the GM the direction you want the story to go.
new_game.script_not_ready_importing: An import or rebuild job is still running in the background. Wait for it to finish before starting, so the setup flow does not stall on the starting point.
new_game.script_not_ready_missing: This script is missing data required to start a game: {{items}}. Finish import/rebuild before starting.
new_game.role_mode_empty: No personas or character cards yet — switching to New Character Card.
new_game.new_card_desc: Fields match the character card library; the card is saved to your library when you create the game.
new_game.intent_desc: Tell the GM what you want to happen. What do NPCs know? What are your secrets? What directions do you want the GM to prioritize? Optional — leave blank to skip. Stored in the save; the GM can reference it every turn.
new_game.mark_reviewed_and_retry: ✓ Mark this script as KB-reviewed and retry
new_game.birthpoints_empty_hint: The script has no birthpoint anchors yet. Please wait for backend processing to complete, then retry.

identity.intro: The identity card is a positioning overlay on top of the character card (undercover / exiled noble / shelter refugee …) — unrelated to name or appearance, independent from the player origin setting below. Optional — leave blank to play as the selected character directly.
identity.no_identity: No identity card — will play as "{{name}}" directly
identity.no_identity_required: No identity card is attached. The save will start directly from the selected character.
identity.npc_desc: Pick a canon character as the protagonist's forgotten true identity. This doesn't conflict with that character card — the protagonist simply has amnesia; when they remember is up to your in-game choices.
identity.ai_desc: Based on script + starting point + selected character card — generates 4 distinct identities.
identity.ai_desc_soul: Generate 4 candidates where a modern-era soul transmigrates into a local body. Skip to use the bare soul-traveler overlay (original character + modern memories) only.
identity.ai_desc_body: Generate 4 candidates for your whole self (body + soul) having crossed into this world as a complete outsider — no local identity card.
identity.ai_desc_dual: Generate 4 dual-soul scenario candidates where your soul and the native soul share one body. The GM will voice the native soul.
identity.ai_desc_native: Generate 4 candidates native to the source world (refugee / undercover / exiled noble …), no modern memories. Skip to keep the original character identity.
identity.ai_desc_isekai: Generate 4 candidates where a modern-era soul has transmigrated into someone in this world. Skip to use the bare time-traveler overlay (original character + modern memories) only.
identity.origin_section_hint: Determines how you enter this story world, affecting how the GM handles your memories, knowledge, and soul configuration.
identity.id_section_hint: The protagonist's social identity in the world, layered on top of the character card. Skip to start as the chosen card "{{name}}" directly.
identity.npc_empty: This script has no selectable canon character cards yet.
identity.npc_known_hint: When taking a canon character's identity, picking "amnesiac" usually makes for a stronger opening — the identity unfolds in play. You can also pick "aware".
identity.known_na_body: A full transfer brings your own body and memories into this world, so there is no local identity to be aware of.
identity.origin_soul_mapping: Character card → foreign soul (memories/knowledge)   Identity card → local body identity (social position/ties)
identity.origin_soul_hint: Classic isekai transmigration. Your mind is a modern person's, occupying the local character's body, with partial foreknowledge of the source story.
identity.origin_body_mapping: Character card → yourself (body + soul)   Identity card → none (complete outsider)
identity.origin_body_hint: Your whole self crosses over. No local identity card — you are a complete outsider with no pre-existing social ties in this world.
identity.origin_dual_essence: Your soul + native soul share one body
identity.origin_dual_mapping: Character card → your soul's perspective   Identity card → native original (GM voices the other soul)
identity.origin_dual_hint: Two consciousnesses share one body. The GM will roleplay the native soul from the identity card. Decisions emerge from collision between the two.
identity.origin_native_mapping: Character card → yourself   Identity card → your social position in this world
identity.origin_native_hint: No foreign soul — you are this character. The GM strictly enforces world-canon and will push back on actions that break the character's established nature.
identity.identity_known_hint: Only applies when an identity card is attached and origin ≠ Body Transfer. Affects your knowledge of that identity at game start.
identity.identity_known_true_desc: You know your identity from the start — social ties, secrets, and positioning are clear.
identity.identity_known_false_desc: You begin with amnesia or just waking up — your identity is discovered gradually through the story.
identity.ai_empty: No recommendations returned. Try manual creation or use the character card directly.
identity.field_alias_desc: Optional — leave blank to use the character card's name
identity.field_role_constraint: At least one of role or background required
identity.field_role_placeholder: e.g. Time-traveler princess / Undercover agent / Exiled noble
identity.field_bg_placeholder: Origin, motivation, and connection to key events in the story world

empty.no_saves_hint: Go to the Scripts page, pick a script, and start a new game — the branch graph will appear once a save exists.

status.name: Name
status.origin_soul_title: Soul Transfer: a modern-era soul in a local body — carries modern memories and foreknowledge
status.origin_body_title: Body Transfer: your whole self crosses over, no local identity card, complete outsider
status.origin_dual_title: Dual Soul: your soul and the native soul share one body, GM voices the other
status.origin_native_title: Pure Roleplay: you are the native character, no foreign soul, GM enforces world-canon

memory.retrieval_subtitle: References recalled from source / RAG / history this round

worldbook.no_rules: (No world rules configured for this script)

characters.on_stage_empty: No characters on stage in this room. Module NPCs / enemies or valid RulesEngine encounters will appear here automatically.
characters.relationships_empty: No relationships yet. Structured 'Relationship: X -> Y' tags in GM output are written here automatically; you can also add them manually with the + button.
characters.platform_tip: To promote an NPC to a permanent User Character Card, go to
characters.platform_tip2: . The game panel only shows runtime entities — no cards are created here.

timeline.no_save: No save context — enter a game first to view the timeline.
timeline.load_failed_hint: (Is the backend running? Does this account own the save?)
timeline.no_anchors: This script has no preset timeline
timeline.no_footprint: No footprint yet — play to accumulate history
timeline.anchors_empty: No timeline anchors generated yet (script may still be seeding, or no chapter summaries)
timeline.drift_hint: 0% = fully on-script · 100% = highly diverged (GM will actively converge)

context.title: Context This Round
context.retrieval_empty: (No retrieval context. Send a message and the context injected for the GM will appear here.)
context.curator_empty: No curator decision this round (sub-agent disabled or fell back to rules)

debug.no_steps: (No steps yet — send a message to see context_agent phases)

rules.not_applicable_desc: The current script is "{{pack}}" and does not use 5E-compatible rules. This tab only shows content (character sheet / rooms / combat / dice log) when a module_adventure module (e.g. Ash Mine) is loaded.
rules.try_module_hint: To try a 5E module, go to Adventure Modules on the platform homepage and start one — the system will create a separate new save and won't affect the current script.
rules.dice_empty: No dice rolled yet. Start a module and make a check to see rolls here.

composer.continue_tip: Let the GM advance the scene without player input
composer.placeholder_writing: Write to advance the story. / for commands, + for attachments.
composer.placeholder_writing_enter_send: Write to advance the story. Enter sends, Shift+Enter inserts a newline. / for commands, + for attachments.
composer.placeholder_writing_newline: Write to advance the story. Enter inserts a newline, ⌘+Enter sends. / for commands, + for attachments.
composer.placeholder_compact: Advance the story, ask a question, or type / for commands…
composer.placeholder_command: Press Enter to run this command
composer.enter_send_on_tip: Current: Enter sends. Click to make Enter insert newlines.
composer.enter_send_off_tip: Current: Enter inserts newlines. Click to make Enter send.
composer.context_usage_tip: Click to see context usage breakdown
composer.model_none: No models available. Configure an API provider in Platform → API / Models.
composer.model_switched_save: GM model for this save switched to {{label}} (other saves unaffected)
composer.perm_footer: 'Full Access' covers most writes, but next-step plans / major setting conflicts / high-risk world-line changes still trigger a non-blocking popup.
composer.ctx_no_data: No data yet (visible after the first message)

command.title: Commands
command.no_match: No match — press Esc to close

permission.read_only_desc: All GM writes require approval; similar to codex suggest
permission.default_desc: Whitelist fields auto-approved; others require approval
permission.review_desc: Whitelist + relationship/world variables auto; others require approval
permission.full_access_desc: All auto except hard blacklist; similar to codex full-auto

list.user_cards_desc: Character cards shared across all scripts and saves.
list.npc_cards_desc: NPC cards extracted from scripts, grouped by save.

import.drop_formats: Supports .png (with embedded metadata) / .json / .webp · Up to 8 at once
import.ai_split_hint: Use when auto-split looks off. Uses quota.
import.ai_split_model_note: The LLM used to sort a free-text profile into structured fields. Changes save to your Settings → Models → AI tidy card fields preference (default gemini-3.5-flash); same picker as the script-import extraction model.
import.footer_hint: POST /api/v1/characters/import · Edit in your card library after import
import.mock_desc: Imported from Tavern card · includes dialogue examples and tags.
import.parse_pending_hint: File size: {{size}} KB · MIME: {{mime}} · Auto-parse not enabled — please fill in fields manually.
import.parse_pending_first_mes: (Please fill in the opening message manually)
import.chat_hint: Upload a SillyTavern chat file (.jsonl) to create a new save you can continue playing.
import.chat_parse_fail: Failed to parse JSONL file — make sure it is a valid SillyTavern chat export.
import.chat_new_save_hint: A new save will be created with all messages imported as history. You can continue from where this chat left off.
import.chat_footer_hint: POST /api/v1/me/chats/import-tavern · Imported save appears in your Saves page

editor.target_script_desc: New NPC cards are saved into this script's card library.
editor.section_basic_desc: Name is required; full name is Western-style; aliases and tags are comma-separated.
editor.section_profile_desc: History / Appearance / Personality / Speech / Current status.
editor.section_story_desc: Key secrets visible to GM only; one dialogue line per row.
editor.section_inject_desc: Controls token budget, priority, importance, and visibility scope for context injection.
editor.name: Name
editor.full_name_desc: Western-style full name; leave blank to match name
editor.aliases_desc: Comma-separated; GM uses these to recognise alternative names for the same character
editor.background_desc: Character's origin before the story begins
editor.current_status_desc: Situation / state of mind at the start
editor.secrets_desc: GM-only; not directly revealed to other characters
editor.sample_dialogue_desc: One line per row; helps GM mimic the character's voice
editor.importance_desc: 0–100; higher values are retrieved and injected first
editor.first_revealed_chapter_desc: Chapter in which this character first appears (chapter gate)

toast.promoted_detail: Now available under Character Cards / User Cards
toast.npc_delete_hint: NPC cards are deleted from the script management page
toast.chat_imported: Chat history imported — new save created

confirm.delete_message: Delete character card "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

empty.no_user_cards: No user character cards yet. Click "New Character Card" to get started.
empty.no_npc_cards: No NPC cards in your scripts yet.
empty.no_npc_hint: Click "New NPC" to create one, or go to Scripts / Import to upload a script with character profiles.
empty.no_settings: No profile yet — switch to Character Settings to fill it in.

matrix.title: Module Matrix
matrix.desc: Current state of all derived data for this script. Each module can be rebuilt independently.

banner.failed_detail: Job ID available in backend logs

estimate.title: Rebuild estimate
estimate.prereq_block_body: Please rebuild the missing modules above first.

chunks.title: Chapter chunks
chunks.desc: Whole book split into passages and indexed — the smallest unit for RAG retrieval

canon.title: Knowledge base entities
canon.desc: Character / faction / location / item / concept entities extracted by the LLM

cards.title: NPC cards
cards.desc: Editable NPC profile cards (used by the GM)

worldbook.title: Worldbook
worldbook.desc: Collection of worldbuilding entries, persistent reference in GM context

embeddings.title: Vector index
embeddings.desc: pgvector embeddings, used for RAG semantic recall
